name: VS1053B MP3/Ogg Audio Codec
description: VLSI VS1053B MP3/Ogg Vorbis/AAC/WMA/MIDI audio codec with headphone driver, SPI control/data, LQFP-48. The Adafruit Music Maker chip. GBUF must never be grounded; CVDD 1.8V core.
dimensions_source: VLSI VS1053B datasheet v1.33 + official LQFP-48 outline DG4966 rev M (body 7.0 sq, overall 9.0, pitch 0.5, foot 0.6). Land pads 0.3x1.5 centers 8.5 c-c per IPC-7351. Pinout ch.6 (CCW).
